prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-701 Fire alarm devices & circuits within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.7 Low Voltage & Specialty. The observed field condition is: missing end-of-line resistor. The work is being assessed at the tested/inspected lifecycle state with source anchors NFPA 72. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: T2 E-701 Document interpretation
